name: BELAJAR DI ERA DIGITAL
description: Universitas Terbuka — MKDI4202 Belajar di Era Digital. 50 soal: literasi digital, digital citizenship, pemilihan media digital, SPT, dan lisensi Creative Commons.

name: KEWIRAUSAHAAN DI ERA DIGITAL
description: Universitas Terbuka — MKDI4203 Kewirausahaan di Era Digital. 50 soal: era disrupsi, effectuation, design thinking, value proposition canvas, business model canvas, dan pemasaran digital.

name: MANAJEMEN SUMBER DAYA MANUSIA
description: Universitas Terbuka — EMBS4209 Manajemen SDM (BMP EKMA4214). 50 soal: perencanaan SDM, rekrutmen, seleksi, kompensasi, penilaian kinerja, pelatihan, dan hukum ketenagakerjaan.

name: MANAJEMEN OPERASI
description: Universitas Terbuka — EMBS4211 Manajemen Operasi. 50 soal: strategi operasi, TQM, peramalan, supply chain, JIT/lean, MRP/ERP, manajemen proyek, dan perencanaan kapasitas.

name: MANAJEMEN PEMASARAN
description: Universitas Terbuka — EMBS4212 Manajemen Pemasaran. 50 soal: pemasaran digital, segmentasi/targeting, iklan daring, media sosial, CRM, green marketing, dan riset pemasaran.

name: RISET OPERASI
description: Universitas Terbuka — EMBS4208 Riset Operasi (BMP EKMA4413). 50 soal: LP/simpleks, transportasi, penugasan, antrian, CPM/PERT, persediaan EOQ, probabilitas, dan game theory.

name: MATEMATIKA EKONOMI
description: Universitas Terbuka — ECON4103 Matematika Ekonomi (BMP ESPA4122 Edisi 3). 50 soal: himpunan, logaritma, deret, fungsi linier/nonlinier, turunan, keseimbangan pasar, optimasi laba, dan elastisitas.

name: MANAJEMEN KEUANGAN
description: Universitas Terbuka — EMBS4210 Manajemen Keuangan. 50 soal pilihan ganda UAS: nilai waktu uang, NPV/IRR, rasio keuangan, struktur modal, WACC, CAPM, manajemen modal kerja, dan pasar keuangan.

name: Managerial Accounting
description: Practice managerial accounting concepts including cost behavior, budgeting, and variance analysis.

name: Calculus Fundamentals
description: Core calculus topics: limits, derivatives, and integrals with formula-based questions.

name: Bahasa Inggris Level 1
description: Elementary 1 — Present Continuous, Can/Can't, Possessive & Object Pronouns. Kosakata: pakaian, bagian tubuh, olahraga, sekolah.

name: Bahasa Inggris Level 2
description: Elementary 2 — Simple Past, Regular & Irregular Verbs, Time Expressions. Kosakata: liburan, pengalaman, peristiwa masa lalu.

name: Bahasa Inggris Level 3
description: Elementary 3 — Future (Will), Be Going To, Comparative & Superlative Adjectives. Kosakata: teknologi, pekerjaan, pendidikan, impian dan tujuan.

name: Bahasa Inggris Level 4
description: Intermediate 1 — Countable/Uncountable Nouns, Some/Any/Much/Many, Present Perfect, Since & For. Kosakata: kesehatan, belanja, uang, restoran.

name: Bahasa Inggris Level 5
description: Intermediate 2 — Present Perfect Continuous, Past Continuous, Used To, Gerunds & Infinitives. Kosakata: media sosial, perjalanan, lingkungan, budaya.

name: Bahasa Inggris Level 6
description: Intermediate 3 — Passive Voice, Relative Clauses, Modals of Obligation & Possibility. Kosakata: bisnis, teknologi, berita, ekonomi.

name: Bahasa Inggris Level 7
description: Upper Intermediate 1 — First/Second/Third/Mixed Conditional. Kosakata: karier, keuangan, politik, global issues.

name: Bahasa Inggris Level 8
description: Upper Intermediate 2 — Reported Speech, Causative, Wish & If Only. Kosakata: akademik, penelitian, hukum, pemerintahan.

name: Bahasa Inggris Level 9
description: Upper Intermediate 3 — Advanced Passive, Inversion, Cleft Sentences, Participle Clauses. Kosakata: profesional, formal & idiomatic expressions.

name: Bahasa Inggris Level 10 — Fluent 1
description: Fluent 1 — Review seluruh tenses, Complex Sentences, Advanced Connectors. Kosakata: 300 Phrasal Verbs, 300 Idioms, Advanced Collocations.

name: Bahasa Inggris Level 11 — Fluent 2
description: Fluent 2 — Synonyms & Antonyms, Word Formation, Prefixes & Suffixes, Nuance of Meaning.

name: Bahasa Inggris Level 12 — Fluent 3
description: Fluent 3 — Formal vs Informal English, Academic Vocabulary, Business Vocabulary, Technical Vocabulary.

name: Bahasa Inggris Level 13 — Fluent 4
description: Fluent 4 — Native Expressions, Slang, Figurative Language, Humor & Sarcasm.

name: Bahasa Inggris Level 14 — Fluent 5
description: Fluent 5 — Advanced Grammar Review, Complex Sentence Patterns, Advanced Vocabulary Expansion, Idiomatic Mastery.

name: Bahasa Inggris Level 15 — Fluent 6 (Near Native)
description: Near Native — Mastery of all English Tenses, Advanced Vocabulary, Idioms & Phrasal Verbs tingkat lanjut, Academic & Professional English, Nuance and Contextual Meaning, Thinking Directly in English.
